content.text:
All 7 active tests pass. 

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added reproduction logic by collecting dead neighbors of live cells (deduplicated via Map keyed on coordinates), then including those with exactly 3 live neighbors. Combined with existing survival filter.
- Result: All tests now pass (7 passing, 2 todo)
- Approach: Minimal addition - reuses existing `countLiveNeighbors`/`isNeighbor` helpers; only candidates considered are dead cells adjacent to at least one live cell (avoiding scanning an infinite plane); deduplication via `Map<string, Cell>` keyed on `"x,y"`.
